categories.name: Cane Sofa Sets

categories.name: Dining Sets

categories.name: Outdoor Furniture

products.name: Meghalaya Heritage Sofa Set
products.description: A three-piece cane sofa set inspired by the colonial architecture of Shillong. The intricate lattice weave reflects the handiwork of master artisans from Meghalaya. Ideal for heritage hotels, boutique stays, and premium residences.
products.material: Natural cane frame with cotton-linen upholstery

products.name: Brahmaputra Lounge Chair
products.description: A deep-seated lounge chair with flowing cane arms and a high wraparound backrest. Named after the great river of Assam, this chair embodies the unhurried pace of Northeast life. Perfect for resort lobbies and wellness retreats.
products.material: Premium grade cane with teak wood accents
products.finish: Natural, antique brown, or matte black

products.name: Khasi Highlands Dining Set
products.description: A 6-seater dining set with a solid bamboo tabletop and hand-turned cane chairs. Inspired by the Khasi community's tradition of communal dining. A statement piece for boutique cafes, heritage dining rooms, and resort restaurants.
products.material: Laminated bamboo top, cane and wood frame chairs

products.name: Nokrek Forest Coffee Table
products.description: A sculptural coffee table with a bamboo base and tempered glass top. The base is crafted from thick-gauge bamboo culms arranged in an organic cluster, evoking the dense bamboo groves of Nokrek National Park.
products.material: Thick-gauge bamboo culms with 8mm tempered glass top

products.name: Valley Breeze Outdoor Set
products.description: An outdoor dining and seating set built for India's climate. Uses treated cane with weather-resistant finishes, perfect for resort pool decks, garden cafes, and outdoor wellness spaces. Lightweight yet durable.
products.material: Varnished cane with polyester all-weather cushions

products.name: Resort Room Package — Standard
products.description: A complete single-room furniture package for resorts and homestays. Includes bed frame, side tables, wardrobe, writing desk, chair, and a lounge chair. Crafted to match your property's aesthetic with custom finishes.
products.material: Premium cane, bamboo, and teak wood combination

products.name: Café Seating Package
products.description: A curated café furniture package: bistro chairs, bar stools, café tables, and a reception counter. Designed for cafes that want to stand out with authentic craft. Mix-and-match finishes available.
products.material: Cane and bamboo with mild steel accents

products.name: Bespoke Project Service
products.description: Work directly with our artisan team to design furniture that doesn't exist yet. We handle everything from concept sketches to prototype approval to bulk production. Minimum 10-piece orders. Ideal for architects and interior designers.
